'''dapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:omega|omega]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:omega|omega]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dapate|dapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dapatesher|dapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dapatesherĂ«m|dapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dapatero|dapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dapateshĂ«|dapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dapateshĂ«m|dapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidapatero|gokidapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidapateshĂ«|gokidapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidapateshĂ«m|gokidapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godapankerom|godapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godapankeshĂ«|godapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godapankeshĂ«m|godapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godapankeya|godapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dapaterom|dapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dapatemu|dapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dapateya|dapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidapaterom|gokidapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidapatemu|gokidapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidapateya|gokidapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dapapate|dapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dapapatesher|dapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dapapatesherĂ«m|dapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dapapatero|dapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dapapateshĂ«|dapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dapapateshĂ«m|dapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidapapatero|gokidapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidapapateshĂ«|gokidapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidapapateshĂ«m|gokidapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godapapankerom|godapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godapapankeshĂ«|godapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godapapankeshĂ«m|godapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godapapankeya|godapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dapapaterom|dapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dapapatemu|dapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dapapateya|dapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidapapaterom|gokidapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidapapatemu|gokidapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidapapateya|gokidapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠpĂŠte|dĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠpĂŠtesher|dĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠpĂŠtero|dĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠpĂŠtero|gokidĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠpĂŠnkerom|godĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠpĂŠnkeya|godĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠpĂŠterom|dĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠpĂŠtemu|dĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠpĂŠteya|dĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠpĂŠterom|gokidĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠpĂŠteya|gokidĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafpafte|dafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafpaftesher|dafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafpaftesherĂ«m|dafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafpaftero|dafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafpafteshĂ«|dafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafpafteshĂ«m|dafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafpaftero|gokidafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafpafteshĂ«|gokidafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafpafteshĂ«m|gokidafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafpafnkerom|godafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafpafnkeshĂ«|godafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafpafnkeshĂ«m|godafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafpafnkeya|godafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafpafterom|dafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafpaftemu|dafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafpafteya|dafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafpafterom|gokidafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafpaftemu|gokidafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafpafteya|gokidafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
